intro_sentences.en: Let's study days of the week.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar os dias da semana.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar los días de la semana.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions les jours de la semaine.

sample_sentences.en: On Sunday, I rest at home.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: No domingo, eu descanso em casa.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le dimanche, je me repose à la maison.

sample_sentences.en: On Monday, I go to work.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Na segunda-feira, eu vou ao trabalho.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le lundi, je vais au travail.

sample_sentences.en: On Tuesday, I study at the library.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Na terça-feira, eu estudo na biblioteca.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El martes, estudio en la biblioteca.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le mardi, j'étudie à la bibliothèque.

sample_sentences.pt-BR: Na quinta-feira, ela cozinha o jantar.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El jueves, ella cocina la cena.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le jeudi, elle prépare le dîner.

sample_sentences.en: On Friday, they watch a movie.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Na sexta-feira, eles assistem a um filme.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le vendredi, ils regardent un film.

sample_sentences.es-ES: El sábado, visitamos a unos amigos.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le samedi, nous rendons visite à des amis.
